# CLI Reference

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_docs_reference.py. Do not edit by hand. -->

The CLI reference is generated from the Typer application in `rlflow.cli`.

## `rlflow`

Subcommands:

- `rlflow compile`
- `rlflow components`
- `rlflow jobs`
- `rlflow run`
- `rlflow sweep`
- `rlflow workflow`

Usage:

```bash
rlflow [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

Options:

| Option | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `--install-completion` |  | Install completion for the current shell. |
| `--show-completion` |  | Show completion for the current shell, to copy it or customize the installation. |

## `rlflow compile`

Usage:

```bash
rlflow compile [OPTIONS] PATH
```

Arguments:

| Name | Required |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | yes |

Options:

| Option | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `--out` |  |  |

## `rlflow components`

Subcommands:

- `rlflow components list`

Usage:

```bash
rlflow components COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

## `rlflow components list`

Usage:

```bash
rlflow components list [OPTIONS]
```

Options:

| Option | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `--kind` |  | Optional component kind filter. |
| `--source` |  | Optional component source filter. |

## `rlflow jobs`

Subcommands:

- `rlflow jobs cancel`
- `rlflow jobs list`
- `rlflow jobs status`

Usage:

```bash
rlflow jobs COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

## `rlflow jobs cancel`

Usage:

```bash
rlflow jobs cancel JOB_ID
```

Arguments:

| Name | Required |
| --- | --- |
| `job_id` | yes |

## `rlflow jobs list`

Usage:

```bash
rlflow jobs list
```

## `rlflow jobs status`

Usage:

```bash
rlflow jobs status JOB_ID
```

Arguments:

| Name | Required |
| --- | --- |
| `job_id` | yes |

## `rlflow run`

Usage:

```bash
rlflow run [OPTIONS] PATH
```

Arguments:

| Name | Required |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | yes |

Options:

| Option | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `--backend` | `local` | local or slurm |
| `--out` |  |  |

## `rlflow sweep report`

Usage:

```bash
rlflow sweep report [OPTIONS] PATH
```

Arguments:

| Name | Required |
| --- | --- |
| `path` | yes |

Options:

| Option | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `--metric` |  |  |
| `--goal` |  | maximize or minimize |
| `--metric-last-n` |  |  |
| `--top-k` | `20` | Number of ranked groups to print. |
| `--all` |  | Print all ranked groups. |
| `--show-trials` |  | Include per-trial metric rows. |
| `--out` |  | Optional directory for report/json/csv files. |
